titleStmt.title: SII 19.352: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 352. (A.R. No. 617 of 1920.) UḌAIYĀRKUḌI NEAR KĀṬṬUMANNĀRKŌYIL, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE maṇḍapa IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, ANANTĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This registers an endowment of half a vēli and one mā of land to the temple of Tirumuḷḷūr-uḍaiya-Paramēśvara at Muḷḷūr alias Simhavishṇu-chaturvēdimaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Kānāḍu on the nothern bank, as śrībalippuṟam for the maintenance of seven persons playing music (during the śrībali service) in temple, by Kāḷi Kaṟṟaḷi a member of the Karikālaśōḻa-teriñja-Kaikkōḷa (regiment). The land is stated to have been situated between this village and Vīranārāyaṇa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam to its east, and to have been purchased from the sabhā of Muḷḷūr, who agreed to pay the taxes thereon with the interest on 60 kāśu received by them for the purpose, and also to get it irrigated from the local tank. The regiment was evidently called after Āditya Karikāla. The inscription is assignable to Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4Āvatu vaṭakarai kānāṭṭu brahmadeyam muḷḷurākiya siṁhaviṣṇuccaturvvedimaṅgalattu tirumuḷḷūruṭaiya parameśvararkku Uṭaiyār karikālacoḻatteriñca kaikoḷaril kāḷi kaṟṟaṉiye ṉivvūr sabhaiyārpakkal nāṉ vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nila mivvūrkiḻir śrīviranārāyaṇacaturvvedimaṅgalattellai varampukku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai Ūrveli varampukku
vaṭakkum mel pāṟkellai Inilattukkup pāyu muṭciṟuvāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kārampicceṭṭār nilattukku teṟku mivvicain=ta nālellaiyilu makappaṭṭa nilamaṟu māvu mivvūr vaṭakaḻaṉi Oṭaivāykkālukku meṟku teṉpāṟkellai murukkaṇṭi trivikrama- paṭṭaṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ānicittar nilattukkum kuḷattukkum kiḻak kum vaṭapāṟkellai śrīviranārāyaṇaccaturvvedimaṅgalattellai varampukku teṟku minnālel laiyi lakappaṭṭa nilam kāl
Ikāl ceyyu maṟumācceyyumāka varaiye yorumā nila minnilattukkuḷattu niriṟaikkap peṟuvatākavum Iccuṭṭappaṭṭa Innilam Iparameśvararkkum kāḷa miraṇṭum ceykaṇṭikai yum Uvaccu nālumāka Ivveḻāḷukkum candrādityavat śrībali ṟamāka Itirumuḷḷū ruṭaiya parameśvararkku kuṭutteṉ kāḷi kaṟṟaḷiyeṉ Ikkāḷi kaṟṟaḷiyiṭai tu sabhaiyo minnilam Araiye yorumāvukkum Iṟai kāttukkuṭuppatāka Ivaṉ pakkal koṇṭa
kācu Aṟupatum Ivvaṟupatu kāciṉ palicaiyāl cantrādityavat Iṟai
kāttukkuṭuppomāṉo mittirumuḷḷūr parameśvararkku sabhai
yom Ivai panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.352 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
